english_text: The temperature is over thirty degrees
Let us go to the beach
Shaved ice is perfect for today
I am going on a trip
It has been raining for days
My clothes are damp from humidity
I cannot sleep because of the heat
I got bitten by a mosquito
I love the long summer days
The sunset is later in summer
I am wearing shorts and a t-shirt
I collected shells at the beach
I am staying in a resort
The river is a great escape
I sleep with the AC on
I want summer to last forever
But I look forward to fall too
